exportReportingUsers.label: exportReportingUsers(global)
exportReportingUsers.document: mutation ExportReportingUsers($input: ExportReportingUsersInput!) { exportReportingUsers(input: $input) { success batchId status errors { code message } } }
exportReportingUsers.curl_pp:
curl 'https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com/graph' \
  -H 'accept: application/graphql-response+json,application/json;q=0.9' \
  -H 'authorization: Bearer <BEARER_TOKEN>' \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -H 'origin: https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com' \
  -H 'referer: https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com/manage/usage-activity/users' \
  -H 'x-correlation-id: <CORRELATION_UUID>' \
  -X POST \
  --data-raw '{"operationName": "ExportReportingUsers", "variables": {"input": {"format": "CSV", "filters": {"eventDateRange": {"startDate": "2026-06-24", "endDate": "2026-07-24"}}}}, "extensions": {"clientLibrary": {"name": "@apollo/client", "version": "4.0.9"}}, "query": "mutation ExportReportingUsers($input: ExportReportingUsersInput!) { exportReportingUsers(input: $input) { success batchId status errors { code message } } }"}'

exportUsers.label: exportUsers(global)
exportUsers.document: mutation ExportUsers($input: ExportUsersInput!) { exportUsers(input: $input) { batchId status message } }
exportUsers.curl_pp:
curl 'https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com/graph' \
  -H 'accept: application/graphql-response+json,application/json;q=0.9' \
  -H 'authorization: Bearer <BEARER_TOKEN>' \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  -H 'origin: https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com' \
  -H 'referer: https://nextgen.monotype-pp.com/manage/users-and-teams/users' \
  -H 'x-correlation-id: <CORRELATION_UUID>' \
  -X POST \
  --data-raw '{"operationName": "ExportUsers", "variables": {"input": {"format": "CSV", "filters": {"status": ["ACTIVE"]}}}, "extensions": {"clientLibrary": {"name": "@apollo/client", "version": "4.0.9"}}, "query": "mutation ExportUsers($input: ExportUsersInput!) { exportUsers(input: $input) { batchId status message } }"}'
